name: Agent Chat Backend API
evidence: api/agent/chat_handler.py implements AgentChatRequest, _run_agent_chat, WebSocket, HTTP NDJSON, and agent info handlers.

sub_tasks.name: Extract shared helpers to api/agent/handler_utils.py
sub_tasks.notes: api/agent/wiki_generator.py imports shared repo/filter/language/send/loop helpers.

sub_tasks.name: Implement AgentChatRequest + _run_agent_chat core
sub_tasks.notes: api/agent/chat_handler.py validates agent/messages, clones the repo, wraps tools, and streams run_agent_loop events.

sub_tasks.name: Add handle_agent_chat_websocket + register /ws/agent-chat
sub_tasks.notes: Untagged events are sent through send_event; route registered in api/api.py.

sub_tasks.name: Add agent_chat_stream (NDJSON) + register /chat/agent-stream
sub_tasks.notes: StreamingResponse uses application/x-ndjson; route registered in api/api.py.

sub_tasks.name: Add get_agent_info + register GET /agent/info
sub_tasks.notes: Returns only wiki, explore, and deep-research agent metadata.

sub_tasks.name: Add WebSocket + HTTP test files
sub_tasks.notes: tests/api/test_agent_chat_websocket.py and tests/api/test_agent_chat_stream.py cover happy and error paths.

sub_tasks.name: Frontend types src/types/agentChat.ts
sub_tasks.notes: Discriminated union covers chat-relevant agent events and request payloads.

sub_tasks.name: Extend src/utils/websocketClient.ts with createAgentChatWebSocket
sub_tasks.notes: Uses structured onEvent callback against /ws/agent-chat.

sub_tasks.name: Frontend HTTP connector src/utils/agentChatStream.ts
sub_tasks.notes: Reads line-buffered NDJSON from /api/chat/agent-stream.

sub_tasks.name: Frontend Next.js proxy src/app/api/chat/agent-stream/route.ts
sub_tasks.notes: Proxies to backend /chat/agent-stream with Accept: application/x-ndjson.

name: RAG Retrieval as an Agent Tool
evidence: _TOOL_CLASSES in api/tools/__init__.py does not register rag_search.

sub_tasks.notes: Pure retrieval component reusing DatabaseManager for the .pkl disk cache.

sub_tasks.name: Implement api/tools/rag.py and api/tools/rag.txt
sub_tasks.notes: Thin Tool-ABC adapter calling get_or_build_retriever(repo_path).

sub_tasks.name: Register rag_search in tool registry and agent configs
sub_tasks.notes: Add to _TOOL_CLASSES, _ALL_TOOLS, and _READ_ONLY_TOOLS.

sub_tasks.name: Post-filter rag_search results in FilteredToolWrapper
sub_tasks.notes: Drop chunks whose meta_data.file_path is excluded by ParsedFilters.

sub_tasks.name: Add unit tests for retriever and tool
sub_tasks.notes: tests/unit/test_retriever.py, tests/unit/test_rag_tool.py, tests/api/test_agent_chat_rag_tool.py.
